Levels.111: Stimulus - prime word displayed in red (CIE x=0.65, y=0.33, 5.8 cd/m²), semantically related word pair, list 1; presented for 200 ms at center of screen, followed by ISI of 900-1100 ms before green target word; no response required to prime
Levels.112: Stimulus - prime word displayed in red (CIE x=0.65, y=0.33, 5.8 cd/m²), semantically related word pair, list 2; presented for 200 ms at center of screen, followed by ISI of 900-1100 ms before green target word; no response required to prime
Levels.121: Stimulus - prime word displayed in red (CIE x=0.65, y=0.33, 5.8 cd/m²), semantically unrelated word pair, list 1; presented for 200 ms at center of screen, followed by ISI of 900-1100 ms before green target word; no response required to prime
Levels.122: Stimulus - prime word displayed in red (CIE x=0.65, y=0.33, 5.8 cd/m²), semantically unrelated word pair, list 2; presented for 200 ms at center of screen, followed by ISI of 900-1100 ms before green target word; no response required to prime
Levels.211: Stimulus - target word displayed in green, semantically related to prime, list 1; presented for 200 ms at center of screen, followed by ITI of 1400-1600 ms; correct response: 'related' button
Levels.212: Stimulus - target word displayed in green, semantically related to prime, list 2; presented for 200 ms at center of screen, followed by ITI of 1400-1600 ms; correct response: 'related' button
Levels.221: Stimulus - target word displayed in green, semantically unrelated to prime, list 1; presented for 200 ms at center of screen, followed by ITI of 1400-1600 ms; correct response: 'unrelated' button
Levels.222: Stimulus - target word displayed in green, semantically unrelated to prime, list 2; presented for 200 ms at center of screen, followed by ITI of 1400-1600 ms; correct response: 'unrelated' button
Levels.201: Response - correct (related button for related pair, or unrelated button for unrelated pair)
Levels.202: Response - error (incorrect button pressed for pair relatedness)
